channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large tree branch damage, 27th June
item.description:
Tree branch has been damaged.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Court, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at litter bin, 27th June
item.description:
Local residents dump rubbish illegally. Please investigate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72H, East Dulwich Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass is very long, 27th June
item.description:
The grass on Salter Road is very long, is it due to be cut soon?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep pothole causing buses to lose their wheels and damage to the local buildings, 27th June
item.description:
You have market this problem as fixed, but it hasn't been fixed. In fact the problem got only worse causing even bigger night nuisance and it is actively damaging buses because they drive over it at speed. Please fix it otherwise the problem will be in the press at some point.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southern Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged Bollard, 27th June
item.description:
Damage following RTC Bollards have been damaged near pedestrian crossing Make safe needed ///beyond.linen.starts
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tudor Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speakers and boxes dumped, 27th June
item.description:
Speakers and boxes dumped on the corner of sudbury crescent and southover. This keeps on happening. As soon as something is cleared, more stuff returns. Could be the same person? Please do something, a sign at least, as this is really upsetting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sudbury Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clifton Road flytip, 27th June
item.description:
Black bag and box fly tipped next to utility cabinet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Clifton Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 27th June
item.description:
Fly tipping behind Victoria Pub

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Fenton Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin overflow, 27th June
item.description:
Overflowing bin onto pavement and road. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: James Watt Way & Pier Road Erith. Litter problem., 27th June
item.description:
Sculpture area at the end of Pier Road Erith is not being cleared of debris, This small place is choker with rubbish that the council's cleaning contractor fails to acknowledge that it needs cleaning up occasionally. Also, a disused tea wagon is permanently parked on this location & requires removing ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): James Watt Way, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime blocking pavement and step down on vicarage grove, 27th June
item.description:
Day 2.this is a P zone. Users should not leave their Lime Bikes here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on pole16: see pic, 27th June
item.description:
Graffiti on pole16: see pic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering after bin collection, 27th June
item.description:
Our pavements in SE208PL are often littered after bin collection, which is becoming quite frustrating

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castledine Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Santo remedio leaving waste on street regularly, 27th June
item.description:
This restaurant regularly leaves waste on the pavement and public right of way overnight, creating a public safety hazard and causing significant cleanliness concerns. The waste is often left uncollected for several days. Although the current situation requires urgent cleaning, a more sustainable long-term waste disposal solution is needed, as the restaurant continues to leave waste on the pavement on a daily basis.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 136-148, Tooley Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Footpath in Tabard park, 27th June
item.description:
There is graffiti on the footpath within Tabard Park. This was first reported on 20th June. Fixmystreet stated it had been removed on 21st June, but the graffiti has not been removed. It was also reported again on 24th June. Please can it be removed from the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant flytipping in Durfey Place, 27th June
item.description:
Flytipping in Durfey Place remains a constant issue. I have already raised this within several complaints. It is now happening almost every day, and it continues to have a real impact on residents. Ms Sophia Opoku-Addo, Resident Services Officer for this area, never replied to any emails about the issue and the working group set up by her predecessor. This is simply unacceptable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durfey Place, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 27th June
item.description:
There are plastic bottles, coffee cups, food packaging, food waste and plastic bags on the pavement and road along Tabard Street. It is on the whole street. The litter has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on footpath in Tabard Park, 27th June
item.description:
There is graffiti on the footpath within Tabard Park. This was first reported on 20th June. Fixmystreet stated it had been removed on 21st June, but the graffiti has not been removed. It has also been reported on 24th June and still has not been removed despite repeated it multiple times. Can the graffiti be removed from the area because it unsightly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manciple Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaves garden waste preventing buggy transport, 27th June
item.description:
People at 118 have left their garden waste on the pavement and it's blocking anyone from being able to walk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambergate Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tenants moved out filled all the bins, 27th June
item.description:
Morning We have tenants at number ( ..) who have left and filled all the blue and green bins in the bin house on Kinburn street. I have tried to tidy it up and make room in some of the bins its still full. The problem will be they will over flow and people will put bags on the floor and then the foxes will tear apart and litter the whole street. Please can we have a extra collection this week Many Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56-58, Kinburn Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
